昨晚進行的意甲第22輪比賽中，米蘭客場1比1戰平羅馬。賽後米蘭主帥加度素接受了意大利《天空體育》的採訪。

本場比賽的情況

「我認為我們踢得很好。羅馬上半場比賽應該得到更好的結果，因為我們的控球很不穩定，但我認為我們在下半場表現出色。也許羅馬理應從這場比賽中拿到更多的積分。他們是一支擁有巨大天賦的強隊，我知道這場比賽會很艱難。」

「我認為我們上半場踢得非常糟糕，而下半場我們因為錯誤的選擇或傳球浪費了很多潛在的機會。對手的防線中存在著空當，但我們總是無法找到這些空當。」

「羅馬很有實力，球員的身體對抗能力也不錯，所以我們在比賽中承受了一些壓力，但我仍然對球隊的表現感到滿意。就像我說的，我承認羅馬可能應該得到更多，但是我真的很喜歡球隊下半場的表現。」

球員的表現

「比安迪是一個會讓對手害怕的球員，當我們打開傳球的通道時，他會讓防守球員不斷後退，這就創造了我們可以利用的空間。他現在狀態很好，為球隊提供了很多幫助。」

「蘇素的技術很好，但他喜歡穿針引線，而不是自己去攻城拔寨，但這是他喜歡的踢球方式，而這樣的踢法也讓他受益良多，所以我們不能改變他的特點。」

蘇素在禁區被高拉洛夫拉倒，但球證並未判罰12碼

「這沒什麼問題，事情就是這樣，如果球證沒有判罰 12碼 ，那麼這肯定不是犯規。」


最識波真係撚撚

Milan have reportedly agreed a deal to sign Nice winger Allan Saint-Maximin for €20m plus bonuses.

According to Sport Mediaset, Nice ‘appreciated’ Milan’s respectful pursuit of Saint-Maximin in the final week of the January transfer window and have accepted a bid.

Saint-Maximin would have also agreed a five-year contract with the Rossoneri, but the broadcaster stresses the deal is likely to depend on Champions League qualification.

Nonetheless, the France Under-21 international will only have a year left on his contract this summer, putting his side in a difficult negotiating position.

Agent Marko Kirdemir also confirmed last week the 21-year-old ‘liked’ Milan as a destination and that a transfer was ‘possible’ in the summer.

Saint-Maximin has scored six goals and assisted three in 23 appearances for Nice this season.

隊友歡送咸錫，但拿玻里宣佈中止交易：大連一方反口

拿玻里的斯洛伐克中場咸錫 (Marek Hamsik) 轉會中超大連一方之事出現變數，拿玻里罕有地作出官方公佈，指買方沒有依照在此前已同意的方法付款，決定暫時不作交易。

拿玻里於周四就咸錫的轉會發出了以下的官方聲明：

「本會已經決定延緩馬歷克咸錫轉會到中國的行動，因為對方沒有按照以協定的付款方式支付先前已同意的數目。」

拿玻里未有說明會否及何時繼續這筆交易，據90min報道，拿玻里暫時不會把咸錫售予大連一方，打算讓他留效至本季尾，才重啟轉會談判。

就在拿玻里發出官方聲明前，一眾球員為咸錫舉行了一個驚喜派對，歡送在這球會效力了十一年半的隊長。有人把他帶到一個神秘地方，說有數名隊友與他共晉晚餐。

31歲的咸錫在到場後發現，全部隊友都濟濟一堂，眾人立即燃點煙花爉燭和開香檳，還用他的17號球衣做了個大蛋糕，唱起拿玻里的會歌，令他既驚喜又感動。

據知情人士透露，歡送派對由拿玻里其中一名球員悉心安排，咸錫顯然有點激動，但派對的氣氛充滿歡樂，多於離愁別緒。

Gattuso: "I am satisfied with what I earn and I thank the management. I have to just focus on my job with professionalism but this is not the moment to talk about my salary"

Gennaro Gattuso realises there is “even more pressure” on Milan to beat Cagliari, stands up for his tactics and Hakan Calhanoglu.

“There is a great deal at stake against Cagliari and there is even more pressure with Lazio and Roma winning,” said the Coach in his Press conference.

It’s a battle royal for fourth place, as those victories mean the two Romans have temporarily leapfrogged the Rossoneri.

“For the last six or seven years, Milan have reached the spring and not even been in the running for a Champions League spot. We must take it one game at a time, but be in a strong position to go for it.

“Our next few fixtures might seem easy on paper, but there is nothing easy in Serie A and this'll tell us if we've matured. We must face every game with concentration and desire, that’s the secret. I want to see a Milan side that doesn’t allow the opposition to attack. I’d happily win every match 1-0.

“We don’t score that many goals because we don’t fill the penalty area very well and there can be some laziness in that. On the other hand, Suso says he has to sacrifice himself playing almost as a full-back and that is true. We need to work together to keep a clean sheet, but get that same determination going forward too.”

The arrival of Krzysztof Piatek from Genoa has certainly made a difference, albeit at the expense of Patrick Cutrone.

“Patrick works hard every day, he has that fire within him, but has also grown mentally and professionally. He doesn’t just think about himself, but the whole group, even if naturally he’s disappointed when he doesn’t play.

“We’ll continue our current tactical approach. I know there are people who only want us to attack, but we must play as a team, with sacrifice for each other. You in the media give credit to the defence, but if the team is so tight, it is thanks to everyone.

“I won’t say we’ll always play like this, but it takes trial and error in training. For example, in future I could see Diego Laxalt and Andrea Conti wide in a five-man midfield, with Lucas Paquetá or Calhanoglu behind the strikers.”

Gianluigi Donnarumma performed heroics against Roma, rediscovering his confidence.

“I think having Pepe Reina near him really helped, as a strong, exemplary professional like the Spaniard is giving him advice every day.”

Gattuso has faced criticism from some quarters, including Minister for the Interior Matteo Salvini, for keeping the faith with misfiring Calhanoglu.

“I don’t throw my players out to sea,” was the response. “Hakan knows he can do much more, but his performances haven’t been total disasters. I read someone claim the squad rebelled because he always plays, but I’ve seen nothing of the sort.

“I give nothing for free and I don’t throw anyone out either. It’s the same with Andrea Conti, he is recovering, but doesn’t play because that’s the way I see it. I have players who I find reliable.

“Lucas Biglia has been out for three months, so his recovery will take more time and he can play when he’s at 100 per cent. The last tests showed Cristian Zapata needs at least another 15 days before he can resume training with the group.”

Hakan knows he can do much more, but his performances haven’t been total disasters.
